summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently. No shared canonical was selected. Close, merge, fix, and low-signal PR closeout were disabled by the job permissions, and no security-sensitive hydrated seed PRs were detected. Each open PR remains open; maintainer or author follow-up is required only for the specific PR gates called out below.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned focused bug-fix PR with sufficient proof should stay open for maintainer review; no autonomous close/merge/fix action is permitted.
Small docs/skill eligibility PR appears useful and linked to #87985, but technical correctness and the failing Real behavior proof require maintainer judgment in this close/comment-only shard.
Feature PR is not low-signal or closable; it needs maintainer/author follow-up on the ClawSweeper issues before any merge path, and merge/fix actions are blocked.
Broad docs accuracy PR requires maintainer technical/content judgment and cannot be closed under the disabled low-signal policy.
Focused Active Memory behavior fix is plausible and not closable, but session-state risk plus mixed proof/check evidence require maintainer technical judgment in this no-merge/no-fix shard.

needs_human: #87958: maintainer-owned focused bug fix with green proof needs maintainer review; merge is blocked by job permissions.
#87986: small linked docs/skill PR needs maintainer technical correctness decision because Real behavior proof is failing despite check-docs passing.
#88048: feature PR has hydrated ClawSweeper issues and status waiting on author; maintainer/author follow-up required before merge consideration.
#88061: broad docs accuracy PR has low-signal-docs label but low-signal closeout is disabled and ClawSweeper still reports issues before merge.
#88078: focused Active Memory fix has plausible proof but session-state risk and mixed check/proof history require maintainer judgment.
